name: hacker-news-client-monorepo
description: Cross-language Hacker News API client suite (monorepo).

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:py && npm run lint:ruby && npm run lint:go && npm run lint:rust
scripts.lint:rust: cd rust && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:js && npm run coverage:ts && npm run coverage:py && npm run coverage:go && npm run coverage:ruby && npm run coverage:rust
scripts.coverage:py: cd python && python3 -m coverage run -m unittest tests.test_client tests.test_unit && python3 -m coverage report --include='src/*' --show-missing
scripts.coverage:go: cd go && go test -cover -coverprofile=../coverage/go.out ./... && go tool cover -func=../coverage/go.out | tail -1
scripts.coverage:ruby: cd ruby && COVERAGE=1 ruby -Ilib -Itest test/test_client.rb && ruby -Ilib -Itest test/test_unit.rb
